items.title: White House teleprompter operator accused of making $100k off Trump speech bets
items.dek: A White House staffer has been accused of using inside knowledge of speeches to make nearly $100,000 on Kalshi.

items.title: Watch: What to know as Genoa bridge disaster trial ends
items.dek: More than 50 defendants have been on trial in Italy over the 2018 bridge collapse which killed 43 people.
